name: TON Strategy Co
summary: PART I Our Business References in this document to the Company, TON, we, us, or our are intended to mean TON Strategy Company, individually, or as the context requires, collectively with its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis. TON Strategy Company is a digital asset treasury and Web3 ecosystem company focused on supporting The Open Network, a public blockchain originally developed to integrate with Telegram, one of the worlds largest messaging platforms.
